info.name: Cashfree Payments APIs
info.description:
## API Authentication

Use the following headers for authentication: **x-client-id (App ID) and x-client-secret (Secret Key)**

Keep your keys **secure** and never expose them in client-side code.

Read more about [Merchant and Partner authentication](https://www.cashfree.com/docs/api-reference/authentication)

- **Generate API Keys:**  
    Each product (Payments, Payouts, etc.) requires separate credentials.  
    In the merchant dashboard, go to:  
    **Payment Gateway Dashboard → Developers → API Keys** to generate keys.
    
- **Production keys** require 2FA.
    
- Only **one key pair** is active at a time.
    

Check more about how to generate keys [here](https://www.cashfree.com/docs/api-reference/authentication#generate-api-keys).

---

## Rate Limits

Cashfree APIs use **rate limiting** to manage the number of requests a client can make within a specific time window.  
This ensures fair usage across all clients, protection against abuse or traffic spikes, and consistent API performance.

- Rate limits may vary by endpoint.
    
- They are defined as the maximum number of requests per **minute** or **hour**.
    

[Learn More about rate limiting](https://www.cashfree.com/docs/api-reference/rate-limits)

---

## Best Practices

- **Use API Versioning:** Always include `x-api-version` (format: `YYYY-MM-DD`).
    
- **Secure Keys:** Store in environment variables; never in client-side code.
    
- **Avoid Concurrent Requests:** Use queues to prevent rate-limit errors.
    
- **Request ID Header:** Add `x-request-id` for better tracking and debugging.
    
- **Test in Sandbox:** Validate your integration before going live.
    

[More best practices](https://www.cashfree.com/docs/api-reference/payments/api-best-practices)

item.name: Orders APIs

header.description: (Required) Client App ID for the API call
(Required) Client Secret key for the API call
(Required) API version to be used. Format is in YYYY-MM-DD
Request id for the API call. Can be used to resolve tech issues. Communicate this in your tech related queries to cashfree

An idempotency key is a unique identifier you include with your API call.
If the request fails or times out, you can safely retry it using the same key to avoid duplicate actions.

request.description:
### Order

An order is an entity which has a amount and currency associated with it. It is something for which you want to collect payment for.  
Use this API to create orders with Cashfree from your backend to get a `payment_sessions_id`.  
You can use the `payment_sessions_id` to create a transaction for the order.

Certain parameters are required based on the merchant’s LOB. For example, within `customer_details`, fields like `customer_bank_account_number`, `customer_bank_ifsc`, and `customer_bank_code` are mandatory for TPV merchants. Similarly, `cart_details` are mandatory for ecommerce merchants, and so on.

request.description:
Use this API to fetch the order that was created at Cashfree's using the `order_id`.

## When to use this API

- To check the status of your order
    

Possible values of order status:

- `ACTIVE`: Order does not have a sucessful transaction yet
    
- `PAID`: Order is PAID with one successful transaction
    
- `EXPIRED`: Order was not PAID and not it has expired. No transaction can be initiated for an EXPIRED order. `TERMINATED`: Order terminated `TERMINATION_REQUESTED`: Order termination requested

request.description:
Use this API to terminate the order that was created at Cashfree's using the `order_id`.  

To terminate an order, set **order_status** to `"TERMINATED"`. Please note that the order may not be terminated immediately, always verify the final order_status in the response.

If the status returns as `"TERMINATION_REQUESTED"`, it means the termination request has been received and is being processed. Once the order is successfully terminated, the status will update to `"TERMINATED"`.

If there is an active transaction that has already moved to **success**, the order may not be terminated.

item.description:
## List of APIs

- **Create Order**  
    Creates a new order in Cashfree with an associated amount and currency.  
    On successful creation, you receive a `payment_session_id` which is used to initiate a transaction for that order.  
    Use this API to create orders with Cashfree from your server.  
    _Important params:_ support for TPV (Third Party Validation), minimum order amount, etc.
    
- **Get Order**  
    Retrieves details of an existing order from Cashfree using the `order_id`.
    
- **Terminate Order**  
    Cancels (terminates) an order created in Cashfree using the `order_id`.
    
- **Get Order Extended** _(used generally for ecommerce)_  
    Fetches extended order details such as address, cart items, offers, and customer information using the `order_id`.
    
- **Update Order Extended** _(used generally for ecommerce)_  
    Updates order-related data such as shipment details or delivery status.

item.description:
## List of APIs

- **Order Pay (used for seamless flow)**  
    Processes a payment for an existing order created using the Create Order API.  
    This is an S2S API and requires the S2S flag to be enabled from the backend.  
    If you want to process plain card payments using this API, the PCI DSS flag is also required (contact support to enable).
    
- **Preauthorization**  
    Performs actions on a preauthorized payment, such as capturing or voiding the amount.
    
- **Get Payment by ID**  
    Use this API to view payment details of an order for a payment ID.
    
- **Get Payments for an Order**  
    Retrieves all payment attempts made for a specific order using the `order_id`.
    
- **Submit or Resend OTP**  
    Submits or resends an OTP for card payments that use Native OTP authentication.

request.description: Use this API to view all order details for a payment link.

item.description:
## List of APIs

- **Create Payment Link**  
    Creates a new payment link.  
    The generated link URL is returned in the response parameter `link_url`.
    
- **Fetch Payment Link Details**  
    Retrieves complete details and the current status of a specific payment link.
    
- **Cancel Payment Link**  
    Cancels an active payment link.  
    Once cancelled, no further payments can be made against it.  
    Only links in `ACTIVE` status are eligible for cancellation.
    
- **Get Orders for a Payment Link**  
    Fetches all order details associated with a specific payment link.

item.description:
## List of APIs

- **Create Refund**  
    Use this API to initiate refunds.
    
- **Get Refund**  
    Use this API to fetch a specific refund processed on your Cashfree Account.
    
- **Get All Refunds for an Order**  
    Use this API to fetch all refunds processed against an order.

item.description:
## List of APIs

- **Get Eligible Cardless EMI Payment Methods for a Customer on an Order**  
    Use this API to get eligible Cardless EMI Payment Methods available for a customer on an order, based on their phone number.
    
- **Get Eligible Offers for an Order**  
    Use this API to get eligible offers for an `order_id` or order amount.
    
- **Get Eligible Paylater for a Customer on an Order**  
    Use this API to get eligible Paylater Payment Methods for a customer on an order.
    
- **Get Eligible Payment Methods**  
    Use this API to get eligible Payment Methods.

item.description:
# List of APIs

- **Get Cryptogram for a Saved Card Instrument**  
    Use this API to retrieve the token and cryptogram for a specific saved card stored in Cashfree’s Token Vault.
    
- **Get All Saved Card Instrument**  
    Use this API to fetch all saved cards stored for the customer in Cashfree’s Token Vault.
    
- **Get Specific Saved Card Instrument**  
    Use this API to fetch a specific saved card stored for the customer in Cashfree’s Token Vault.
    
- **Delete Saved Card Instrument**  
    Use this API to delete a specific saved card stored for the customer in Cashfree’s Token Vault.

item.description:
# List of APIs

- **Get All Settlements**  
    Use this API to get all settlement details by specifying the settlement ID, settlement UTR, or date range.
    
- **Get Settlements by Order ID**  
    Use this API to view all the settlements of a particular order.
    
- **Mark Order For Settlement**  
    Use this API to pass the CBRICS ID to Cashfree and mark an order for settlement.
    
- **PG Reconciliation**  
    Use this API to get the payment gateway reconciliation details with date range.  
    It will have events for your payment account.
    
- **Settlement Reconciliation**  
    Use this API to get settlement reconciliation details using Settlement ID, settlement UTR, or date range.  
    This API will return events for the settlement IDs you want.

request.description:
A plan allows your customer to identify the features you offer along with your pricing. You can create plans as per the pricing you support for your services. For each plan, you can set a pre-decided frequency and amount with which they’ll be charged.
Example: Netflix Plans - Premium, Basic, Standard, Mobile. Each plan differs and caters for a particular set of audiences.

item.description:
# Plan

A plan allows your customer to identify the features you offer along with your pricing. You can create plans as per the pricing you support for your services. For each plan, you can set a pre-decided frequency and amount with which they’ll be charged.  
Example: Netflix Plans - Premium, Basic, Standard, Mobile. Each plan differs and caters for a particular set of audiences.

- **Create a Plan**  
    Use this API to create a plan.
    
- **Fetch Plan**  
    Use this API to fetch plan details.
    

# Mandate

- **Create Subscription**  
    Use this API to create a new subscription.
    
- **Fetch Subscription**  
    Use this API to fetch subscription details.
    
- **Manage a Subscription**  
    Use this API to manage a subscription. You can cancel, pause, activate, or change the plan of a subscription.
    
- **Upload File for Physical NACH Authorization**  
    Use this API to upload file for Physical NACH Authorization.
    
- **Fetch Payment Method Details for Subscription Payments**  
    Use this API to check if a payment method is enabled for your account.
    
- **Generate Transaction Return Summary**  
    Use this API to generate transaction return summary for failed transactions (insufficient balance).
    

# Payment

- **Raise a Charge or Create an Auth**  
    Use this API to create an auth or to raise a charge.
    
- **Fetch Details of a Single Payment**  
    Use this API to fetch details of a single payment of a subscription.
    
- **Manage a Single Payment**  
    Use this API to manage a payment of a subscription. A payment can be cancelled or retried with this API.
    
- **Fetch Details of All Payments of a Subscription**  
    Use this API to fetch all payments of a subscription.
    

# Refunds

- **Create a Refund**  
    This API allows you to create a refund on a successful payment. Refund amount can be partial or the full amount of the payment.
    
- **Fetch Details of a Refund**  
    Use this API to fetch details of a refund of a subscription payment.

request.description:
### Order
An order is an entity which has a amount and currency associated with it. It is something for which you want to collect payment for.
Use this API to create orders with Cashfree from your backend to get a `payment_sessions_id`. 
You can use the `payment_sessions_id` to create a transaction for the order.
